name: @tuanla90/plugin-enhanced-table-block
description: Enhanced table block with an aggregate summary row (sum, average, count, distinct, min, max; bottom or sticky-top), instant stats when you drag-select cells, and a responsive card mode that stacks rows as cards on narrow screens. Works on V1 and V2 pages.
description.zh-CN: 增强表格区块，支持汇总行和圈选求和功能
